name: Atmus Filtration Technologies Inc.
h1: Atmus Filtration Technologies's GCC footprint in India
lede: Atmus Filtration Technologies runs two capability centers in Pune. Pune, covering engineering & design and gcc/gic, built over three years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Atmus Filtration Technologies office in India. We map two, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Atmus Filtration Technologies GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Atmus Filtration Technologies runs 2 verified GCC centers in Pune, covering engineering & design and gcc/gic. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Atmus Filtration Technologies's India footprint covers Pune, spanning engineering & design and gcc/gic. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and HR for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all three decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Atmus Filtration Technologies operate in India?
faq.a: Atmus Filtration Technologies operates 2 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Atmus Filtration Technologies have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Atmus Filtration Technologies's India GCC presence is in Pune.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Atmus Filtration Technologies run in India?
faq.a: Atmus Filtration Technologies runs engineering & design and gcc/gic centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Atmus Filtration Technologies's India GCCs?
faq.a: Atmus Filtration Technologies's India centers employ in the 201 to 500 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Atmus Filtration Technologies's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 3 leaders at Atmus Filtration Technologies's India centers, across Finance and IT. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
